updates.note: The Finance Department officially implemented the 5-year age relaxation by amending the West Bengal Services (Raising of Age-limit) Rules, 1981 via Notification 1707-F(P2). Upper age limits for recruitment are now officially raised to 41 years for Group A, 44 years for Group B, and 45 years for Groups C & D. The notification is retroactively effective from May 11, 2026.

Cabinet approved 5-year upper age limit extension for all state government job applicants on May 11, 2026 (Day 1). This was a pre-election promise referenced by Home Minister Amit Shah. Anandabazar confirms this applied to all government jobs, not just school posts. Official notification from recruitment boards pending — cabinet decision recorded, no gazette yet. ↗ Business Standard | PTI | May 11, 2026 ↗ Anandabazar Patrika | May 11, 2026 ↗ The Hindu | May 11, 2026
